title: rubus × militaris
intro: Rubus × militaris, also known as Himalayan blackberry, is a hybrid species of the Rubus genus, specifically a cross between the European blackberry (Rubus fruticosus) and the Himalayan blackberry (Rubus armeniacus). This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain anthocyanins and flavonoids that have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus × militaris include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
